cmm1ocr4u000askk1lhnfher1.ingredients:
It contains saccharomyces/rice ferment filtrate, lactobacillus/rice ferment, and other probiotic fermented lysate ingredients to help nourish the skin's innate strength.
It is a product that has completed EWG green grade safety ingredients and UV protection test for human application.

cmm1t1q0a000hskk1uhm03hsi.ingredients:
Oryza Sativa (Rice) Seed Water 30% provides rich vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants for a more supple, healthy-looking skin.
Panthenol strengthens and soothes the skin’s moisture barrier against UV rays and external stressors.
cmm1t1q0a000hskk1uhm03hsi.promoTooltipText: Synced from Olive Young daily. Ends 2026-03-31 (UTC+9).

cmm384dkv00009y89d4menw1c.ingredients:
Mainly using ginseng, a Korean traditional medicinal herb, which is a core ingredient of BOJ and has been proven to be effective through various research results.
Saponin components abundant in Panax Ginseng Root Extract help to inhibit skin aging and improve wrinkles, and supply nutrition to the skin.
The capsule serum formula that excludes surfactant moisturizes your skin while adhering to your skin and protecting it from UV rays without any gaps.
Saponin, rich in ginseng, promotes hydration and helps keeps the skin moist, and also helps to maintain healthy skin.
Panax Ginseng Berry and Panax Ginseng Root Extract mixed in Panax Ginseng Root Extract are more effective in preventing skin aging and improving wrinkles due to their high saponin content than regular ginseng root.
Niacinamide is a water-soluble vitamin B ingredient that is effective in improving pigmentation and helps to improve skin texture and brighten the complexion by maintaining the skin's moisture balance.

cmm3b24h400069y89jwhd50p9.ingredients: Propolis Extract, Dipropylene Glycol, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Water, Niacinamide, 1,2-Hexanediol, Melia Azadirachta Flower Extract, Melia Azadirachta Leaf Extract, Sodium Hyaluronate, Curcuma Longa (Turmeric) Root Extract, Ocimum Sanctum Leaf Extract, Theobroma Cacao (Cocoa) Seed Extract, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Extract, Centella Asiatica Extract, Corallina Officinalis Extract, Lotus Corniculatus Seed Extract, Calophyllum Inophyllum Seed Oil, Betaine Salicylate, Sodium Polyacryloyldimethyl Taurate, Tromethamine, Polyglyceryl-10 Laurate, Caprylyl Glycol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Dextrin, Pentylene Glycol, Octanediol, Tocopherol, Xanthan Gum, Carbomer

cmm3dp5x5000e9y89aq9dhjko.ingredients:
The silica powder absorbs sebum to increase the product's adherence and provides a matte, smooth feeling and a softness during use.
Containing Artemisia capillaris and Camellia sinensis leaf extract, it helps create smooth skin while maintaining its moisture.
Mugwort has been an important raw ingredient in the history of oriental medicine, and Artemisia capillaris in particular has been used to lower body heat since ancient times due to its cold properties.
Also, mugwort helps to nourish and soothe the skin as it contains various minerals such as vitamins A and C.
